definition: The maturity bifurcation can resolve via four paths: fiscal consolidation (~10% probability), central bank backstop (~30%), inflation de-anchoring (~15%), or managed financial repression (~30%). The two most likely paths both involve central bank accommodation of fiscal dynamics.
evidence: Path B: ECB OMT 2012, BoE Sept 2022, Fed March 2020
Path D: Japan 2003 VaR shock → YCC, Italy 2012 pre-OMT
Both most-likely paths consistent with fiscal dominance findings from iter_0016
open_questions: Whether a fifth path exists combining elements of multiple resolution types
Timeline for resolution — could extend beyond 2028
